name: audio-wandas-analyzer
description: Analyze audio files in VS Code with a TypeScript extension UI and a Python backend powered by wandas.

commands.title: Audio Analyzer: Analyze File or Folder

audioWandasAnalyzer.pythonCommand.description: Python command used to launch the analysis backend.

audioWandasAnalyzer.defaultPeakCount.description: Number of dominant frequency peaks shown per channel.

audioWandasAnalyzer.debugFilePath.description: Debug audio file or directory path used by the Analyze Debug Path command. Relative paths are resolved from the first workspace folder.

scripts.test:e2e:vscode: npm run compile && if command -v xvfb-run >/dev/null 2>&1; then xvfb-run -a node dist/e2e/runVscodeE2E.js; else node dist/e2e/runVscodeE2E.js; fi
